metric_protocol.aggregate_miou: dataset-level confusion-matrix mIoU over 20 Pascal VOC foreground classes
metric_protocol.per_image_miou: per-image mIoU averaged only over foreground classes present in that image
metric_protocol.per_image_zero_filled_miou: diagnostic metric that includes absent foreground classes as zero and is not used for aggregate reporting
